# Basic test for mcpdiff functionality

# First, make sure the test files exist
exists sample1.mcp
exists sample2.mcp
exists different1.mcp
exists different2.mcp
exists timestamp1.mcp
exists timestamp2.mcp

# Help flag should show usage
mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage:'
stderr 'Options:'

# Test with default settings (should show differences in ID)
mcpdiff sample1.mcp sample2.mcp
stdout 'id":1'
stdout 'id":2'

# Test with JSON output
mcpdiff --json sample1.mcp sample2.mcp
stdout '"matches": false'
stdout '"file1": "sample1.mcp"'
stdout '"file2": "sample2.mcp"'

# Test with regular differences
mcpdiff different1.mcp different2.mcp
stdout 'version'
stdout '1.0.0'
stdout '2.0.0'

# Test with timestamps (should ignore by default)
mcpdiff timestamp1.mcp timestamp2.mcp
stdout 'Files match'

# Test with timestamps comparison explicitly enabled
mcpdiff -t=false timestamp1.mcp timestamp2.mcp
stdout '1000.001'
stdout '2000.002'
! stdout 'Files match'

# Test with timestamps comparison explicitly disabled
mcpdiff -t=true timestamp1.mcp timestamp2.mcp
stdout 'Files match'
! stdout '1000.001'
! stdout '2000.002'

-- sample1.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}} # 1234567890.123
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"name":"test-server"}} # 1234567890.124

-- sample2.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}} # 1234567890.123
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"result":{"name":"test-server"}} # 1234567890.124

-- different1.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}} # 1234567890.123
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"name":"test-server","version":"1.0.0"}} # 1234567890.124
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"read","params":{"path":"sample.txt"}} # 1234567890.125

-- different2.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}} # 1234567890.123
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"name":"test-server","version":"2.0.0"}} # 1234567890.124
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"write","params":{"path":"sample.txt"}} # 1234567890.125

-- timestamp1.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"test"} # 1000.001

-- timestamp2.mcp --
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"test"} # 2000.002
